# Bert Games

> Bert Games is the indie studio of Bertus Engelbrecht — designing and shipping original games, creative apps, and interactive projects across the web, Android, Steam, and Roblox.

## Featured project

- [Bert's Gamebook Creator](https://bertgames.com/games/gamebook-creator/): A complete toolkit for writing, playing, and sharing Fighting Fantasy-style gamebooks. Free, browser-based, with an Android APK build. Includes a rich text editor, visual flowchart, customisable character sheet builder, reader mode with dice and auto-save, and a public library for community-made gamebooks.

## All projects

- [Surviving Skeleton Island](https://store.steampowered.com/app/2287170/Surviving_Skeleton_Island): Survival adventure game on Steam.
- Pirate Clicker Adventures: Pirate-themed clicker and progression game built in Unity.
- [Relic Scavengers](https://www.roblox.com/games/92907649043381/Relic-Scavengers): Treasure-hunting Roblox adventure.
- [BroBattle](https://www.roblox.com/games/17816427287/BroBattle-Fun-FFA-Arena-Shooter): Multiplayer Roblox FFA arena shooter.
- [Bert's Gamebook Creator (web)](https://bertsgamebookcreator.netlify.app): Interactive gamebook creation tool.
- [Wandering Blade](https://wanderingblade.netlify.app): Action-adventure web game with exploration and combat.
